base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of score_popup_numbers — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Score-text sprites — 100, 200, 400, 500, 800, 1000, 2000, 4000, 8000 visible on sheet. Each renders at pickup/stomp location, floats up ~16 px over ~30 frames then despawns. Red palette by default. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Score-text sprites — 100, 200, 400, 500, 800, 1000, 2000, 4000, 8000 visible on sheet. Each renders at pickup/stomp location, floats up ~16 px over ~30 frames then despawns. Red palette by default; flagpole scores use green
